name: warden
description: Trustless agent vault for tokenized real-world assets

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @warden/agent build && pnpm --filter @warden/monitor build && pnpm --filter @warden/imessage build && pnpm --filter @warden/dashboard build
scripts.demo: pnpm --filter @warden/agent demo && pnpm --filter @warden/monitor demo && pnpm --filter @warden/imessage demo
scripts.verify:submission: pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm demo && pnpm e2e && pnpm swarm:ci && pnpm stylus:check && pnpm preflight:robinhood
